title: Reimaden SMP
description: Modpack intended for Reimaden Minecraft servers
body:
This is a vanilla+ modded SMP pack intended for a small to medium group of players (who hopefully know each other).

It's generally used to test new and updated mods from [me](https://modrinth.com/user/Maxmani).

Great emphasis has been placed on performance. The pack has a lot of performance mods to go with whatever small content mods there are.

New mods might be added and old ones removed as time goes by. Whenever a new server is set up, this pack usually sees a major revision.
